step_by_step_thinking:
I concur that option A (abutment) should be selected because although connectors also play a part in load distribution, they do not have direct contact with the bone like the abutment does. While both connector type and boning technique influence overall performance, the abutment has an immediate effect on gum integrity and thus more直接影响牙周骨组织的健康。因此，我认为结论是正确的。
答案：同意。

Agree - Although connectors affect load distribution and can contribute indirectly to bone health by ensuring proper function, their primary interaction is with other components rather than directly contacting the bone. In contrast, the abutment interacts directly with the surrounding tissues and plays a critical role in how forces are transferred from teeth back into the jawbone, thereby impacting marginal bone levels more immediately. Given this, my agreement stands firm.
